positive: A whimsical, minimalist scene featuring a stylized crescent moon guiding a delicate silhouette of a leaping fox. The fox is rendered in clean, solid vector lines against a gradient celestial background of deep indigo, soft lavender, and pearlescent gold. The composition is centrally focused, with the fox poised in dynamic motion, evoking freedom and wonder. Art style should be highly detailed, graphic illustration, reminiscent of modern folk art, with strong negative space and limited, sophisticated color palette. The moon emits a soft, magical glow. Perfect for apparel printing, clean edges, high contrast, vector art look.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, noise, messy lines
